lessons: ACTION_MAP had wrong indices: search=75 (should be 61), pickup=61 (should be 50), open=57 (should be 48), drink=64 (should be 53), eat=35 (should be 30) — fixed in env.py and SKILL.md
Wizards must not melee; narrow corridors prevent pet from helping — avoid entering 1-tile corridors with enemies behind
First floor can have boulder-blocked corridors; need to push boulders or find alternate routes
Running play.py via tmux is reliable; direct nohup fails because WSL instance terminates

games.cause: unknown — agent should update after analysis
paused by user after picking up unopened large box
lessons: Containers (box/chest/large box) must be opened (kick/unlock) before looting. Never pick up unopened containers early game — large boxes are extremely heavy and burden movement/combat.

games.cause: Killed by a gnome lord in The Gnomish Mines (Dlvl 3) at XP level 1, 9/16 HP: flanked by a gnome lord + hobbit, chose to fight instead of ascending the escape-hatch upstairs, took a 9-dmg hit and died.
lessons: Flanked at low HP by a 'lord' monster -> ascend the up-stairs you arrived on; do NOT trade blows in the open. The escape hatch was set up but not used.
Reached Dlvl 3 / the Mines at XP level 1 (under-leveled). The Dlvl 2-4 down-branch can be the lethal Gnomish Mines; grind XP before going deeper.
Carried an UNREAD blessed scroll of identify + an uncursed ring of sustain ability at death — reading identify (safe) would have IDed the ring. Don't hoard usable ID/escape items.
Wasted ~60 turns on a pet-held ring chase and forcing an EMPTY locked box, gaining 0 XP -> stayed level 1. Prioritise XP/progress over marginal loot.
Identified at death: ring of sustain ability, scroll of identify (tiger-eye-ring / KERNOD-WEL appearances this game).
